description: The Gulfstream G700 represents the ultra-luxury flagship of private aviation. With class-leading cabin space, advanced flight decks, and high-efficiency Rolls-Royce engines, it flies up to 7,500 nautical miles in absolute comfort.
The Gulfstream G650ER holds the record for the farthest, fastest flights in business aviation. Powered by twin Rolls-Royce engines, it flies up to 16 passengers at speeds of Mach 0.925.

The Bombardier Global 7500 is the world's largest and longest-range business jet. Featuring four separate living spaces, a full kitchen, and a master suite, it redefines ultra-long-range luxury travel.
The Challenger 650 is a wide-cabin executive jet combining unmatched reliability and low operating costs. Outfitted with high-speed internet and standard Ka-band connectivity.
The Falcon 10X is Dassault's upcoming ultra-wide-cabin flagship jet. Boasting a cabin taller and wider than any other business jet, it represents the absolute peak of modern aeronautical engineering.
A high-performance trijet, the Falcon 8X is designed for exceptional runway performance. Operating from short runways while bridging continents with 6,450 nautical miles of range.
The Praetor 600 is the most advanced super-midsize business jet. Active turbulence reduction, a low cabin altitude, and a state-of-the-art fly-by-wire cockpit system.
The Legacy 650 is a large-class business jet featuring three distinct cabin zones. Known for its robust airframe construction and huge baggage space.
The Citation Longitude provides a quiet cabin experience with a very low cabin altitude. Powered by Honeywell engines, it is designed for transcontinental travel.
The Citation X+ is legendary as one of the fastest civilian aircraft in history, cruising comfortably at Mach 0.935. Unbelievable aerodynamic swept-wing profile.
The HondaJet Elite II utilizes a revolutionary Over-The-Wing Engine Mount (OTWEM) structure. This design increases cabin quietness and fuel efficiency in the light jet class.
The Boeing Business Jet (BBJ) 737 Max offers corporate airliner space. It features fully customizable luxury apartments in the sky, flying up to 6,600 nautical miles.
The Gulfstream G500 delivers high-speed cruising and a cutting-edge symmetry flight deck with active control sidesticks. High-end comfort for 13 passengers.
Equipped with specialized Nuage seating and a next-generation wing, the Global 6500 provides a smooth, productive ride on flights of up to 6,600 miles.
The Falcon 900LX features a three-engine configuration for added safety and performance on oceanic crossings. High fuel-efficiency and outstanding short-runway agility.
The Phenom 300E is the best-selling light jet in the world. Features a spacious cabin designed in collaboration with BMW Designworks, single-pilot capability.
The Citation Latitude stands as the most popular midsize jet. Features a wide, flat floor cabin, advanced environmental controls, and low cabin altitude.
The ACJ319neo delivers airliner-class reliability and space. Its custom interior includes lounge areas, dining rooms, and a bedroom suite for intercontinental trips.
Referred to as the 'Super Versatile Jet', the PC-24 is designed to operate on unpaved gravel and grass runways, featuring a massive rear cargo door.
The Cirrus Vision Jet is a single-engine personal jet. Featuring the revolutionary CAPS parachute system and Safe Return autoland for ultimate owner-pilot safety.
The SJ30i is a light business jet with high-speed swept-wing design. Boasting high-altitude cruise capabilities and standard luxury leather upholstery.
The Learjet 75 is a high-performance business jet featuring a double-club layout for 8 passengers, high climb rates, and robust structural aerodynamics.
